notes: Approved Chan SRC02_S01 two-leg cointegration pair. AUDUSD.DWX is the D1 host; NZDUSD.DWX is the synchronized hedge leg. Registry slots 4 and 26 preserve each symbol's allocated magic.

The logical basket replaces component-symbol Q02 attempts against the former inert P1 scaffold. The implementation performs annual walk-forward OLS/CADF/OU fitting, mean-reach or half-life exits, and card-authorized no-native-stop sizing under RISK_FIXED.
